name: ComputerScienceLessons
oneLine: UK-curriculum-aligned CS revision channel with structured lessons mapping to GCSE and A-Level specifications.
bio: ComputerScienceLessons is a UK-focused educational channel covering the GCSE and A-Level Computer Science curriculum: data representation, computer architecture, networks, databases, algorithms, and programming theory. Videos are organised as exam-board-aligned playlists rather than reaction or news content, aimed at students revising for AQA, OCR, and Edexcel papers. The host is not publicly named on the channel.
style: Slide-driven narrated lessons, 5-15 minutes, structured as a sequenced curriculum playlist rather than standalone videos.
